message:
refactor: prune 12 dead/duplicate DoltStore methods and 650 lines (bd-h0zvj.6)

Deleted 8 methods with zero external callers:
- GetDiff, GetIssueDiff (internal DiffEntry/IssueDiff types also removed)
- MergeAllowUnrelated (unused federation method)
- PushWithCredentials, PullWithCredentials (duplicates of PushTo/PullFrom)
- UnderlyingConn, IsClosed (unused accessors)
- GetChangesSinceExport (unused export delta tracker, ExportChanges type removed)

Unexported 4 methods used only within dolt package:
- GetIssueHistory → getIssueHistory
- GetIssueAsOf → getIssueAsOf
- GetInternalConflicts → getInternalConflicts
- UpdatePeerLastSync → updatePeerLastSync

Associated types also unexported: IssueHistory, TableConflict.
Tests for deleted methods removed; tests for unexported methods updated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew
